role: Platform-agnostic credential storage infrastructure with multiple backends (macOS keychain, Linux secret-tool, Windows DPAPI, in-memory).
responsibility: Provides a unified interface for secure persistence and retrieval of secrets like LLM API keys, with factory functions for project-scoped and global credential stores that automatically select the appropriate platform backend.

children.role: Infrastructure facade providing platform-specific credential storage backends for secure secret persistence across macOS, Linux, and Windows, with an in-memory fallback.
Infrastructure module providing pluggable, secure credential storage for LLM API keys, with deterministic factory functions for project-scoped and global stores.
